Localization.Description: Attempt to read the list of secrets or engines

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} failed to read the list of engines in Vault on host {event_src.host}. Reason: "{reason}".
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} read the list of engines in Vault on host {event_src.host}
